name: The World of Jura Tempest
description: A comprehensive lorebook of the Jura Tempest Federation universe from That Time I Was Reincarnated as a Slime, covering characters, locations, factions, species, magic systems, and major events. Full spoilers through Light Novel volume 16.

1.content: Jura is the primary world in which the Tempest Federation and most major powers reside. It is one of several planes created by Veldanava, serving as a Chaos World with properties blending both material and spiritual realms. The world is protected by Veldanava's power directly, making it far more durable than other dimensions—its very surface can withstand cosmic-scale destruction without tearing. The Central World contains at least 1.3 billion sentient beings across three major continents: the Magic Continent where human kingdoms and monster nations coexist, the Ice Continent ruled by the first Demon Lord Guy Crimson, and El Dorado under Demon Lord Leon Cromwell. The dangerous oceans teem with massive creatures that attack ships, making sea travel nearly impossible. Protection comes from multiple sources: holy relics like the Divine Tree, powerful individuals such as Mediators, the Demon Lords under Guy's leadership, and the Chosen Heroes who oppose them. The world possesses inherent healing power that rapidly closes dimensional ruptures.
1.name: The World of Jura

2.content: Clayman, the Crazy Pierrot and Marionette Master, was a Demon Lord created by Deathman Kazalim as tactical commander of the Moderate Harlequin Alliance. A cunning manipulator preferring shadows to direct conflict, Clayman used his unique skill to enslave subordinates and plotted the Jura-Tempest Federation's destruction. His fatal flaw was overconfidence—assuming control over Milim and underestimating Rimuru, leading to his defeat and death.
2.name: Clayman

3.content: Demon Lords are the most powerful individuals in the world, recognized both as a rank and as members of an organized council. A Demon Lord is an individual who has undergone their Awakening through the Harvest Festival or achieved equivalent power, fundamentally transforming their existence into something greater. Formally, Demon Lords are tracked through a council system—originally established by Guy Crimson two thousand years ago as part of his game against Rudra, starting with just three Ancient Demon Lords: Guy, Milim Nava, and Ramiris. The council evolved into the Ten Great Demon Lords, then restructured into the Octagram with a maximum of eight members, though this limit has been revised. The council gathers for mandatory meetings called Walpurgis, where territorial disputes, treaties, and grievances are mediated through majority vote. Membership requires either backing from three current members or demonstrating sufficient strength to challenge through a strength test. Failure in such challenges typically results in death. Rimuru Tempest now serves as the nominal leader, though Guy Crimson remains the unofficial supreme authority.
3.name: Demon Lord

4.content: Diablo, also known as Noir or Primordial Black, is the third-oldest of the seven Primordial Daemons and serves as Rimuru Tempest's personal butler and second secretary of the Jura-Tempest Federation. Diablo displays a humanoid form with black hair streaked with red and gold, golden eyes with red pupils and black sclerae, and typically wears a butler outfit with a red chain accent, though in his prior archdaemon form Diablo wore aristocratic garments. Diablo is whimsical yet calculative, holding to high levels of etiquette and respect while harboring a ruthless and cold nature he exposes to enemies, with his loyalty to Rimuru so extreme that being dismissed represents the only thing that truly terrifies him. Diablo ceased pursuing power long ago because any fights became too easy, remaining as an Archdaemon despite having sufficient strength to evolve into a Daemon Lord until Rimuru named and evolved him. After receiving the name Diablo from Rimuru, Diablo evolved into a Daemon Lord and became leader of the Black Numbers, recruiting hundreds of other daemons to serve Rimuru as the de facto strongest fighting force in Tempest.
4.name: Diablo

5.content: Divine Existence refers to beings of transcendent spiritual nature beyond ordinary physical constraints. These entities operate on a higher plane of reality, possessing power that influences fundamental laws. Divine existences stand apart from mere gods—they represent transformed spiritual entities ascended beyond demi-spiritual classification. Their nature allows incomprehensible action and reality-reshaping power. This represents the ultimate ascension for sentient beings.
5.name: Divine Existence

6.content: Dragons are ancient, immensely powerful intelligent creatures that rank among the world's strongest species. True Dragons possess overwhelming magical power, longevity spanning millennia, and intelligence rivaling or exceeding humans. Dragons are rare and solitary, with most true dragons maintaining dominion over vast territories as supreme local powers. Dragons possess natural-born unique skills and magical capabilities that make them formidable in combat. Notable dragons in recorded history include Veldora, a chaotic True Dragon bound within Rimuru for centuries, and Velgrynd, an ancient dragon who predates most modern civilizations. Dragons are fundamentally proud and treat most other beings as lesser creatures.
6.name: Dragon

7.content: Evolution refers to the process by which a being transforms into a higher or different state of existence. In Jura, evolution occurs through multiple pathways: natural evolution triggered when a creature gathers sufficient energy or meets specific conditions, forced evolution through powerful abilities, or deliberate merging of skills to create superior forms. The process is fundamental to monster progression, allowing creatures of lower races to ascend to higher races, and enabling the acquisition of new traits and abilities. Evolution is not instantaneous for all aspects of a being—while the soul and core may transform immediately, the material body often requires extended periods to fully ascend to a spiritual state. Named monsters find evolution easier to achieve than unnamed ones, and certain conditions can catalyze evolution unexpectedly. The most dramatic evolutions occur at significant thresholds of power, transforming the nature of one's existence entirely.
7.name: Evolution

8.content: The Great War is a legendary ancient conflict involving multiple demon lords that shaped the world's political structure. Resulting in massive destruction and technological regression, the war established power hierarchies and territorial divisions still existing today. Guy Crimson remembers its aftermath, and its legacy makes modern powers cautious about escalation.
8.name: Great War

9.content: Guy Crimson, also known as Rouge or Primordial of Red, is the oldest of the seven Primordials, the first known true demon lord, and the first seat of the Octagram who resides on the Ice Continent. Guy presents as a handsome man with blood-red eyes containing dancing stars of gold and silver, two black stripes under each eye, and wavy deep rouge hair around waist-length; Guy also possesses a female form with unknown characteristics and can take daemon form with characteristic horns, wings, and claws. Guy's personality is typically prideful and relaxed yet intimidating, though Guy exhibits a caring side toward recognized individuals and respects those who show no fear, becoming more casual in their interactions and serving as a serious mediator for world balance. Born during the dawn of time before creation of heaven and earth as a demonic counterpart to the Seven Angels of Origin, Guy initially ruled the Daemon Realm as its king but discovered immortality among other primordials after fighting Bleu and Vert, creating an eternal stalemate. After incarnating as a true demon lord using a million corpses and later being defeated by Veldanava, Guy accepted the role of Mediator, gaining a materialized heart and the unique skill Pride, which later evolved into the ultimate skill Lucifer after battling the Frost Dragon Velzard.
9.name: Guy Crimson

10.content: The Great Jura Forest is a vast woodland at the center of the Magic Continent, once serving as a buffer zone between warring nations. The forest was expanded and shaped by the magical influence of Storm Dragon Veldora, who ruled it for centuries before his sealing. The forest contains Lake Siss in its center, surrounded by marshlands controlled by lizardmen communities. Three main paths traverse the forest: one from the Great Canaat Mountains in the north and another along the Great Ameld River, though neither supports large-scale military movement. After Rimuru's coronation as a Demon Lord, the entire forest fell under the Jura-Tempest Federation's dominion, with the forest's resources now requiring permission from Demon Lord Rimuru to access.
10.name: Jura Forest

11.content: The Jura Tempest Federation is a multi-species nation founded by Rimuru Tempest in the Jura Forest after Rimuru's rise to prominence as a Demon Lord. The Federation originated as the monster nation of Tempest before expanding to incorporate human communities and other races, becoming the largest unified inter-species state in the world. The Federation is recognized as a tier-one power by international bodies like the Octagram and maintains diplomatic relations with the Eastern Empire, Holy Empire of Lubelius, and the Armed Nation of Dwargon. Rimuru Tempest serves as the Federation's supreme leader and acts as the de facto mediator between species and factions.
11.name: Jura Tempest Federation

12.content: Magic is the embodiment of an idea that produces effects in accordance with natural law. Magic manifests as energy expression of the caster's imagery and intent, affecting even spiritual life-forms immune to physical phenomena. Spellcasting requires incantations and hand signs to channel mana, though skilled visualizers can cast without them. Magic categorizes into types: Aspectual magic directly controls magicules; Elemental magic borrows from spirits and obeys natural law; Holy magic manipulates power through faith; Summoning magic calls beings from other planes; Dark magic used by daemons; and specialized forms like rune magic and soul magic. The fundamental nature of magic lies in the caster's ability to envision their desired outcome for the world language to manifest it.
12.name: Magic Systems

13.content: Milim Nava is the daughter of Veldanava and one of the first generation Demon Lords, serving as one of Rimuru Tempest's most important allies and best friends. Milim appears as a youthful girl around fourteen to fifteen years old with platinum pink hair in twin tails, blue eyes, and typically wears a bold swimsuit-like outfit with a long-sleeve shirt; in true form Milim manifests as a Dragonoid with a crimson horn on the forehead and large wings. Milim's nature is childish and outspoken, but behind this demeanor lies a fierce, extremely intelligent woman who cannot be tricked by even the brightest minds, though Milim's tendency to disregard others' complexities in favor of straightforward approaches often leads to overlooked situations. Born millennia ago as princess of the Kingdom of Nasca, Milim lost her father Veldanava and mother Lucia, then watched her beloved pet dragon Gaia slain, triggering a catastrophic rampage that destroyed the Great Sorcerous Nation Of Soma and killed thousands. Guy Crimson and Elemental Queen Ramiris pacified Milim after seven days of battle, and the three became the founding members of the Demon Lord council, with Milim dedicating herself to helping people in recompense.
13.name: Milim Nava

14.content: Monsters are sentient and non-sentient life-forms fundamentally based on magicules. As magical creatures, most monsters can survive indefinitely on magicule reserves alone, requiring neither food, water, sleep, nor breathable air. There are three primary origins for monsters: Spawning, where a monster emerges from the Factor and magicules latent in the environment or released by a parent; Procreation, where single or paired monsters engage in biological reproduction; and Majinization or Monsterization, the transformation of non-magical life-forms into magical ones through exposure to excessive magicules or magical rituals. Monster types include Magic Beasts—monsterized animals forming the majority of monsters, including the ancient and powerful Dragons whose ancestry traces to an Elemental Dragon created by Veldanava; Majin—monsters possessing human-level intelligence and rational thought; Named Monsters whose naming grants them easier skill acquisition and potential racial evolution; Undead—demi-spiritual creatures inhabiting lifeless bodies and exceptionally vulnerable to holy magic; and Unique Monsters born with exceptional traits not typical of their species, often far stronger than ordinary members. The level of a monster is determined by the concentration of magicules at its birth or evolution, with evolution itself triggered either by reaching sufficient magicule thresholds or meeting additional specific conditions.
14.name: Monster

15.content: The Octagram is the governing council of the world's eight strongest Demon Lords, founded by Guy Crimson approximately two thousand years before Rimuru's reincarnation. The Octagram was originally known as the Ten Great Demon Lords but was restructured to maintain a maximum of eight members, each controlling vast territories and populations. The council convenes during Walpurgis banquets to settle territorial disputes, ratify treaties, and mediate conflicts between members. Rimuru Tempest joined the Octagram as its leader after the Genesis of Rivalry, fundamentally altering the council's composition and influence. Membership requires extraordinary power equivalent to Demon Lord rank and approval by majority vote during a Walpurgis gathering.
15.name: Octagram

16.content: Oni are powerful demi-human creatures known for physical strength and horned appearances. Emphasizing martial strength and honor, Oni serve as warriors and leaders. With natural magic affinities, Oni races like the Ogre clan evolved into more powerful variants. Notable examples include Benimaru and Gabiru.
16.name: Oni

17.content: Ramiris, titled the Labyrinth, is one of the first generation Demon Lords alongside Guy Crimson and Milim Nava, the third seat of the Octagram, and manager of the Dungeon; Ramiris also serves as the Chosen hero's Guide and preserves the balance of the entire world. Ramiris appears in pixie form as a small fairy barely larger than a flower with golden eyes and blonde hair in pigtails, easily mistaken for an ordinary pixie due to complete lack of presence, though in true form Ramiris is described by Veldora as a beautiful woman. Ramiris displays not a shred of demon lord dignity and is completely oblivious to lacking presence, speaking freely about whatever strikes her without listening to others, acting ridiculously free-willed and doing whatever she wants, while underneath this behavior lies a kindhearted nature willing to help those truly in need. Thousands of years ago, after Milim's devastating rampage from losing her pet dragon, Ramiris pacified the enraged Milim by absorbing the evil magic of Daemons and powerful aura of Dragons, beginning to transform into a corrupted Elemental. The three—Ramiris, Milim, and Guy—settled their dispute and established themselves as the first Demon Lords with different objectives: Guy would pursue the ultimate skill, Milim would live as she pleased, and Ramiris would judge the world.
17.name: Ramiris

18.content: Rimuru Tempest is the reincarnation of Japanese office worker Satoru Mikami, who was killed and reborn as a slime in a fantasy world. Rimuru is genderless and eccentric in nature, though this masks a sharp analytical mind constantly weighing the pros and cons of actions and playing long-term strategy over short-term emotion. Rimuru appeared first as a blue translucent slime, growing in size and power as the story progresses, before gaining the ability to take a human form resembling a young androgynous teenager with silver-blue hair and golden eyes. Despite their often childish and manipulative tendencies—including lying about official accounts, erasing memories, and creating false information—Rimuru deeply cares for subordinates and followers, treating them as family. Rimuru's goal is to create a convenient world where life is comfortable and everyone can enjoy entertainment comparable to Earth, and Rimuru ascended to True Demon Lord status and eventually evolved into an Ultimate Slime. Rimuru ultimately became the founder of the Jura-Tempest Federation, building a nation from the monster city of Tempest.
18.name: Rimuru Tempest

19.content: Shizu was a Japanese Otherworlder and A+ ranked hero known as the Conqueror of Flames. Summoned by Demon Lord Leon Cromwell as a child and possessed by the Greater Flame Elemental Ifrit, she learned to control her power under Hinata's mentorship. Choosing to die as a human rather than continue as a Majin, Shizu asked Rimuru to consume her. Her soul remains within him, and his human form now resembles her.
19.name: Shizu

20.content: Skills are supernatural abilities that rarely manifest through personal growth and the acknowledgment of the World Language. They function as special phenomenon activation systems that automatically perform inscribed supernatural effects—powers that alter natural laws according to the user's will. When acquired, a skill is inscribed into the person across one of five locations: the material body, spiritual body, astral body, soul, or heart core. Skills rooted in the soul are far more powerful than those in the body, as they represent full sublimation into the user's being. Activation requires only thought and sufficient energy reserves—soul force, mana, or magicules—without needing to understand the mechanism behind it. All users instinctively know how their skill works and how to activate it. Skill potency depends heavily on the user's willpower; two identical skills can produce vastly different results depending on the will driving them. Skills can be acquired through birth, mastering an art and desiring its form, inheritance, or in the case of the most powerful skills, through simple wish and desire. Skills range from intrinsic abilities tied to physiology, to common skills with single effects, to extra skills and unique skills born from strong emotions, up to ultimate skills that rewrite the laws of the world itself.
20.name: Skill

21.content: Slimes are amoeba-like monsters composed of gelatinous membranes capable of absorbing matter and energy. Slimes vary dramatically in power and intelligence based on their core strength and evolutionary status, ranging from mindless creatures to sentient beings capable of speech and strategic thought. Most slimes possess the biological capability to consume and assimilate other creatures, incorporating their properties into their bodies through an absorption process. Slimes lack traditional biological organs, instead relying on their unique anatomy to process nutrition and maintain consciousness. The species includes sapient individuals such as Rimuru Tempest, whose evolution to a Unique Skill-wielding Slime transcended typical limitations of the species.
21.name: Slime

22.content: Summoning is the foundational event that initiated the entire narrative of TenSeSlime—the process by which Rimuru Tempest was transferred from Japan to the world of Jura. A Japanese office worker named Mikami Satoru was killed in a traffic accident in his world and inexplicably appeared as a slime creature in the Jura Forest with his memories and intelligence intact. This transformation granted him an immediate unique skill, Predator, and exceptional potential for rapid growth and skill acquisition. The mechanics behind Rimuru's summoning remain partially mysterious—he was not summoned through any known ritual or individual's intention, suggesting either a cosmic accident or divine will acting through unknown mechanisms. Rimuru's arrival as an otherworlder with his human knowledge and perspective proved transformative for the Jura region, as his outsider viewpoint and innovative thinking led to the founding of Tempest and the subsequent reformation of the entire political landscape. The summoning event fundamentally altered Rimuru's trajectory: had he been born as a normal slime, he would have remained a mindless beast; instead, he retained consciousness and evolved rapidly into a unique individual. The concept of summoning also introduced implications about other worlds, reincarnation systems, and the possibility of other otherworlders arriving in Jura.
22.name: Summoning

23.content: Tempest is a monster nation founded and ruled by Demon Lord Rimuru Tempest in the center of the Great Jura Forest. Tempest began as a goblin village before evolving into a federation when goblin, lizardmen, orc, dryad, and treant communities merged under Rimuru's leadership, creating a written treaty with the Armed Nation of Dwargon. Tempest is an absolute monarchy with Rimuru as the head of state, supported by a cabinet of ministers overseeing internal affairs, foreign relations, defense, and infrastructure. The nation serves as an economic hub connecting multiple western kingdoms through trade roads and technology exchanges. Tempest's chief exports are high-quality healing potions, alcohol, silk clothing, and master-crafted dwarven and ogre weapons. The nation maintains a dungeon managed jointly by Ramiris and Veldora, spanning 94 floors with industrial operations and research facilities.
23.name: Tempest

24.content: Veldora Tempest is the fourth-oldest of the five True Dragons and the incarnation of chaos, born with control over wind, water, and space. Veldora takes the form of a tall, broad-chested man with blond hair, golden eyes, black zigzag markings under the eyes and on the arms, wearing a black cape with red lining and armored gauntlets and boots. In dragon form, Veldora's body is covered in black steel-like scales with bluish wings and underside, deep golden eyes, and four horns extending backward from the head. Veldora's personality is boisterous and excitable but also fairly easygoing, though beneath childish behavior lies considerable knowledge and an unquenchable curiosity about the world. After being imprisoned in the Infinity Prison by a hero 300 years ago, Veldora befriended Rimuru when the slime bumped into him, eventually storing Veldora within Rimuru's body for a year. Through exposure to Rimuru's memories of Earth media and his developing relationship with Rimuru as a sworn friend, Veldora matured into a more patient and analytical personality, becoming one of Rimuru's closest allies.
24.name: Veldora Tempest

25.content: Albis, the Golden Snake Horn, leads the Three Beastketeers and became Benimaru's second wife. A heavy drinker valuing companionship and combat prowess, she transformed from initially outclassed warrior into powerful fighter to gain acknowledgment. Docile to allies, ferocious in battle, Albis acts as caring older sister with hidden wisdom beneath her demeanor.
25.name: Albis

26.content: Angels are celestial beings associated with heavenly realms and divine power, serving as agents of holy authority. Angels possess wings enabling flight, ethereal bodies that can interact with both material and spiritual planes, and inherent magical abilities. Angels are drawn to serve religious institutions like the Holy Church and embody concepts of righteousness and divine judgment. Angels possess power comparable to high-tier demons and can engage in direct combat with major monster powers. Angels rely on holy weapons and divine magic, which are particularly effective against undead and demonic creatures. Angels are relatively rare in direct participation in worldly affairs, typically remaining isolated in heavenly realms. The appearance of angels in the mortal world signals serious divine intervention or conflict.
26.name: Angel

27.content: Awakening is the process of transcending one's current existence to achieve a higher form of being. Multiple pathways lead to awakening, each fundamentally transforming the individual. For those with demon lord potential, the Harvest Festival occurs when all requirements are met, with the World Language confirming the candidate's intent and initiating transformation into a True Demon Lord or Awakened Demon Lord. For chosen heroes, awakening involves hatching the chosen hero egg through proving oneself and merging with one's contracted elemental, becoming a True Chosen Hero. Other paths include awakening through cultivation—manually growing stronger through training, mastering arts, gathering energy, and fighting opponents until transcending one's mental barriers; through receiving gifts from a higher being's harvest festival; through temporary awakening via god-grade equipment, certain skills, or merging with high-ranking elementals; and through pseudo awakening, where insufficient resources create an unstable, weakened form. Artificial awakening has been developed through ritual using ultimate skills like Beelzebuth and magnified soul concentrations. Demi-spiritual beings can awaken into spiritual forms, and spiritual beings can ascend to divine natures. The central principle of awakening is that it represents a permanent transformation into a higher plane of existence, granting power and properties inaccessible to un-awakened beings.
27.name: Awakening

28.content: Benimaru is Rimuru's Minister of Defense and among his three strongest subordinates. Originally an ogre prince, he evolved into a powerful Kijin. Carefree yet calculating, he found contentment serving Rimuru after initially resisting the ogre chief role. His position as military leader refined his hot-headed nature into rational decision-making, developing appetite for challenging stronger opponents.
28.name: Benimaru

29.content: The Clayman Invasion, the Orc Disaster, was the first major military crisis threatening Tempest. Clayman manipulated the orc population into a massive invasion led by Geld. Rimuru consumed Geld to counter the threat, leading to his Demon Lord awakening and transformation of Tempest into a regional power.
29.name: Clayman Invasion

30.content: The Demon Realm, also called Hell or the Netherworld, is a Spiritual World where daemons originate. Accessed through Hell Gates, its deepest depths contain the Abyss with Nihility—minus energy capable of annihilating existence. Classified as an Adjacent World parallel to the Otherworld.
30.name: Demon Realm

31.content: The Dukes of Tempest are the highest-ranking noble class within the Jura Tempest Federation, serving as Rimuru Tempest's primary governing body and military leadership. The Dukes include powerful individuals such as Diablo, Testarossa, Carillon, and Ultima—Evolution Originators and uniquely evolved monsters of legendary power. The Dukes oversee territorial administration, manage diplomatic affairs, and command the Federation's armed forces. As Rimuru's most trusted lieutenants, the Dukes enforce the Federation's laws and represent Rimuru's interests in matters of state.
31.name: Dukes of Tempest

32.content: Dwargon is a technologically advanced underground dwarven nation within the Great Canaat Mountains. Founded by Hero King Guran Dwargo, it occupies a naturally occurring cavern fortress. A traditional monarchy with mandatory military service, Dwargon excels in industrial production and Elemental Engineering. It maintains close ties with the Jura-Tempest Federation as the first to recognize its sovereignty.
32.name: Dwargon

33.content: Dwarves are a stout, muscular humanoid species renowned for their craftsmanship, metallurgy, and underground civilization. Dwarves possess exceptional strength, durability, and endurance compared to baseline humans. Dwarves naturally excel at mining, metalworking, and engineering, possessing inherent understanding of materials and structural principles. Dwarf societies traditionally organize around mountain strongholds and underground cities, with family clans controlling specific trades and territories. Dwarves place strong emphasis on honor, contracts, and fair dealing in commerce. The Armed Nation of Dwargon is a major dwarf-dominated power that maintains military parity with human kingdoms. Dwarves are pragmatic regarding inter-species relations and form alliances based on mutual benefit.
33.name: Dwarves

34.content: The Eastern Empire is a massive militaristic human nation that ruled as the world's dominant power before its defeat by the Jura Tempest Federation. Founded over two thousand years ago by consolidating Nasca, Namrium, and Ulmeria, it operated under absolute autocratic rule under emperors named Rudra. Now in peace accords with the Federation.
34.name: Eastern Empire

35.content: Elves are a long-lived human-like species known for their connection to nature, magical aptitude, and elegance. Elves possess pointed ears, slender builds, and naturally graceful movement. Elves are naturally inclined toward magic and possess longer lifespans than humans, allowing accumulation of significant knowledge and power. Elf societies organize around forest ecosystems and natural environments, maintaining harmony with the natural world. Elves are skilled artisans, craftspeople, and warriors, combining physical finesse with magical capability. Elven cultures place strong emphasis on honor, tradition, and maintaining balance with nature. Elves are cautious about dealings with monster species but recognize individual merit regardless of race.
35.name: Elves

36.content: Footman, the Angry Pierrot, is a majin member of the Moderate Harlequin Alliance, originally an elf soldier loyal to High Elf Princess Kagali. Resurrected after Milim destroyed Soma, he wears a mask matching Kagali's disfigurement in solidarity. Beneath his carefree demeanor lies calculating cunning used in combat through mockery and taunts. He cares deeply for friends despite his intensity.
36.name: Footman

37.content: The Founding of Tempest marks establishment as an organized nation from a monster settlement. Starting with Rimuru defeating Direwolves and attracting refugees, it evolved to formal nationhood with capital, institutions, and diplomatic status. Revolutionary in demonstrating a slime monster could establish a nation accepted by both human and demonic powers.
37.name: Founding of Tempest

38.content: Gabiru is a Dragonewt captain of the Hiryuu aerial force and researcher in Tempest's potion production. Originally an overconfident lizardman, he evolved through multiple transformations. His ego made him vulnerable to manipulation by Laplace and Gelmud, but the Orc Lord battle humbled him. Now cooler-headed despite initial foolishness, Gabiru displays intelligence in magical and scientific theory.
38.name: Gabiru

39.content: Geld is the Orc King and son of the deceased Orc Lord, leading the Second Corps as Rimuru's subordinate. Serious and hardworking, he initially felt responsible for the Orc Disaster but was supported by Rimuru to overcome his self-doubt. Gentle toward children and loyal friends, he is merciless to enemies, sharing Rimuru's conviction to never betray allies.
39.name: Geld

40.content: Gelmud was a high-echelon majin serving Clayman and orchestrating the Poisoning Plan to create puppet Demon Lords. He created the Orc Disaster by naming Geld, believing named monsters would stay loyal. Geld consumed him instead, preventing his ascension. Gelmud harbored insecurity around Clayman despite his usefulness.
40.name: Gelmud

41.content: Giants are a humanoid species distinguished by their immense physical size, strength, and natural durability. Giants stand significantly taller than humans and possess proportionally greater strength, making them formidable in physical combat. Giants are naturally intelligent and capable of complex societies, though their size necessitates resource-intensive lifestyles. Giants typically possess longer lifespans than humans, though shorter than truly ancient races like dragons or vampires. Giant cultures emphasize martial prowess and combat capability as markers of status and worth. Giants are capable of wielding massive weapons and armor specifically crafted for their body proportions. The species produces warriors of legendary strength, though giant populations remain relatively sparse compared to more numerous races.
41.name: Giant

42.content: Hermes is a priest of the Dragon Faithful worshipping Milim Nava and assistant to Middray. Unlike his hot-blooded superior, Hermes brings temperance and diplomatic understanding. His travels have granted him insight into cuisines and culture, making him the thoughtful face of the Dragon Faithful.
42.name: Hermes

43.content: The Holy Church is a religious institution wielding significant influence across the Western Nations as both spiritual authority and political power. Hostile to monsters and non-human races, its clergy includes combat members and sacred knights. The Church named Walpurgis banquets as omens of catastrophe and has engaged in military campaigns against perceived threats.
43.name: Holy Church

44.content: The Holy Empire of Lubelius is a theocratic nation ruled by Luminous Valentine with a 100-year non-intervention pact with the Jura-Tempest Federation. Despite diplomatic neutrality, the nations exchange technology and culture. The Holy Empire houses Western Holy Church branches with significant influence in western kingdoms.
44.name: Holy Empire

45.content: The Holy Empire Invasion was a major military campaign by the Holy Empire and Church against Tempest, orchestrated by Luminous Valentine and Church leadership. Ultimately repelled by Tempest's defenses and Rimuru's Demon Lord awakening, it forced Rimuru to recognize that peaceful coexistence required demonstrating sufficient power to deter aggression.
45.name: Holy Empire Invasion

46.content: Ifrit is a Greater elemental of Flame with intrinsic Flame Transformation skill, enabling conversion of bodies into intense heat. Notable contractors include Hinata, Leon Cromwell, and Shizu.
46.name: Ifrit

47.content: Intermediate skills represent a stage of skill development representing mastery beyond basic common skills but falling short of extra skill complexity. They serve as a bridge in the progression from learned abilities to more powerful supernatural capabilities. While definitive characteristics remain poorly documented, intermediate skills are understood to emerge through dedicated mastery of fundamental techniques and the growing synthesis of multiple skill components. Advancement through skill tiers requires not merely repeated use but genuine understanding and emotional connection to the ability's nature.
47.name: Intermediate Skill

48.content: Kumara is a Cryptid initially enslaved by Clayman, freed by Rimuru, and evolved into a nine-tailed fox. Remarkably intelligent and cunning, she manipulated Rimuru into granting her nine distinct aspects forming the Calamity-level Eight Legions. Despite her shrewd nature, she remains loyal and serves as Dungeon Guardian.
48.name: Kumara

49.content: Myrddin is a mystical being of considerable knowledge and insight with obscure origins. Representing the mysterious sage archetype, Myrddin possesses capabilities beyond ordinary comprehension and wisdom enabling perception of hidden truths. Their role involves counsel regarding significant events and characters' destinies, with motivations aligned to cosmic balance.
49.name: Myrddin

50.content: Predator is Rimuru's iconic unique skill enabling consumption of entities and absorption of their abilities. Sub-functions include Predation, Analysis for understanding consumed matter, Stomach for spatial storage, Mimicry for form replication, and Isolation for housing dangerous entities safely. The skill evolves into ultimate skill Beelzebuth upon Rimuru's Demon Lord awakening.
50.name: Predator

51.content: Rabbit Ear Mountain is a distinctive landmark within Jura. The mountain is named for its distinctive twin peaks that resemble rabbit ears. The location is inhabited by various monster species and marks a notable geographical point in the Jura region.
51.name: Rabbit Ear Mountain

52.content: Ranga is a magical wolf named by Rimuru and leader of the Star Wolf Clan. Initially a direwolf, he evolved into a Tempest Star Wolf through multiple transformations. Possessed of extreme dog-like loyalty to Rimuru, he displays fierce protectiveness and willingness to sacrifice himself. Toward outsiders, Ranga appears ferocious and blunt, rivaling Shion for Rimuru's affection.
52.name: Ranga

53.content: Sacred Mountain is a notable geographical feature in the world of Jura, serving as a location of spiritual significance. The mountain lies in the territories of the Holy Empire and is associated with holy and divine phenomena in the region.
53.name: Sacred Mountain

54.content: Shion is Rimuru's First Secretary among the Twelve Guardian Lords. Originally an ogre, she evolved into a striking Kijin. Though possessing no secretarial skills, she serves as bodyguard while Shuna handles administration. Clumsy and simple-minded despite her appearance, Shion is passionate about cooking and easily angered. Her resurrection by Rimuru transformed her insecurity into determination to overcome her limits, eventually growing in wisdom and tactical insight.
54.name: Shion

55.content: Tsubaki is a mysterious character within TenSeSlime's expanded universe. Her name, meaning camellia, suggests elegance and nobility. Spider-associated traits in fantasy suggest intelligence and cunning. Her inclusion indicates significance within specific plot arcs related to Rimuru's expanding circle.
55.name: Tsubaki

56.content: The Underworld is a spiritual domain distinct from the physical world, associated with death and the afterlife. The Underworld exists as a parallel realm accessible through specific magical means and serves as a location of significance in the cosmology of the world.
56.name: Underworld

57.content: Unique skills are abilities born as the pure expression of a being's mind, emotions, and desires. Unlike common and extra skills obtained through effort or knowledge, unique skills can only be manifested by powerful individuals undergoing strong emotional experiences or growth events. The act of crossing between worlds through summoning, accident, or reincarnation significantly increases the likelihood of awakening a unique skill, making otherworlders especially valuable. Each unique skill is truly unique to its user, serving as a mirror of their mind and consciousness, and they cannot be copied by normal means. Only about 10 percent of those who awaken unique skills possess abilities with apparent combat utility. A critical truth known only to the wise: unique skills can only reach their full potential when the user understands them as reflections of themselves rather than mere tools. Those who treat them only as weapons never unlock their true power. Unique skills reside either in the body or soul, with soul-rooted skills offering protection against mind-affecting abilities and in extreme cases serving as replacement housing for consciousness itself. As the user grows and matures, their unique skill evolves alongside them—changing names, forms, and abilities. The pinnacle of this evolution is the birth of an ultimate skill, crystallized through years of nurturing with strong emotions and energy.
57.name: Unique Skill

58.content: Vampires are ancient intelligent demi-humans with immortality and supernatural strength, requiring blood for sustenance. Vulnerable to holy light and sanctified artifacts, they possess natural magic affinity and develop abilities over centuries. Hierarchical societies honor ancient vampires like Luminous Valentine of the Octagram.
58.name: Vampire

59.content: Walpurgis Night refers to mandatory council meetings of Demon Lords with strict protocols for dispute mediation and voting. Participation is enforced through supernatural compulsion. These meetings determine territorial divisions, authorize actions, and establish world policies. Rimuru's entry fundamentally altered proceedings with his moral perspective.
59.name: Walpurgis Night

60.content: Apito is an Insectar originally a Queen wasp forced to flee to the Central World. Rimuru found her injured, healed her with slime, and named her. After awakening as a Star Wasp, Apito collects nectar at treant settlements and serves as Guardian of the Dungeon's 80th floor.
60.name: Apito

61.content: Chloe Aubert is a Summoned Otherworlder and legendary Chosen hero specializing in time-related skills who imprisoned Veldora. Introverted yet strong-willed, she developed determination through repeated time-travels to save loved ones. When Hinata died, her consciousness triggered Chloe's Time Traveler skill, transporting them 2,000 years into the past.
61.name: Chloe Aubert

62.content: Demons are powerful magical creatures originating in the Demon Realm with intelligence and power rivaling sapient species. Ranging from minor demons to Demon Lords, they embody diverse forms and evolutionary lineages. Strength-based hierarchies govern interactions, with dimensional rifts and summoning enabling contact with surface powers.
62.name: Demon

63.content: Demon Rank is a classification system distinguishing demons by power level and evolutionary status. Ranging from basic demons to Arch Daemons of ultimate-skill-wielding power, the hierarchical scale increases through age, experience, and cultivation. Used as a threat assessment tool by organizations like the Eastern Empire.
63.name: Demon Rank

64.content: The Farmus Kingdom is a human kingdom located in the western regions of the world. Farmus has historically maintained its independence as a minor power, conducting its own affairs and diplomacy. The kingdom faced internal corruption and conflict during certain periods of its history. Farmus maintains trade and diplomatic relations with neighboring nations and the Jura Tempest Federation. The kingdom's military consists of conventional human armed forces typical of human monarchies in the world.
64.name: Farmus Kingdom

65.content: Grucius is a settlement or region, likely a location within the Beast Kingdom of Eurazania based on geographical and administrative divisions of that kingdom.
65.name: Grucius

66.content: Hargeon is a port city serving as a maritime hub in the western region. The city functions as a trading center and coastal settlement with access to sea routes, making it an important location for commerce between nations.
66.name: Hargeon

67.content: Harpies are winged humanoid creatures possessing both avian and human characteristics, typically adapted for flight and aerial combat. Harpies display feathered wings, taloned feet, and distinctive facial features combining human and bird traits. Harpies are naturally suited to aerial mobility and possess exceptional balance and spatial awareness. Harpy cultures often emphasize freedom of movement and independence, adapting to mountainous or skyward territories. Harpies can interbreed with other humanoid species, producing hybrid offspring with varying characteristics. Harpy individuals can develop magical abilities and combat prowess, becoming formidable warriors when properly trained. The species remains relatively uncommon compared to terrestrial humanoid races, occupying ecological niches in high altitudes.
67.name: Harpy

68.content: Hinata Sakaguchi is a Japanese Otherworlder and leader of the Western Holy Church's Ten Great Saints. A cold pragmatist willing to cooperate with anyone if it benefits mankind, she carries the Legend-grade rapier Moonlight. Trained by Shizu, Hinata dreams of creating a world without conflict. After discovering the Church's vampire conspiracy and being defeated by Luminous, she agreed to serve her.
68.name: Hinata Sakaguchi

69.content: Holy Knights are elite warriors serving the Holy Church with rigorous holy power training. As the Church's military backbone, they wield god-grade weapons and channel holy magic into devastating techniques. Becoming a Holy Knight requires decades of training and institutional backing.
69.name: Holy Knight

70.content: Holy Weapons are rare artifacts imbued with holy attribute power, ranging from unique-grade like Dragon Buster to god-grade Excalibur. Devastating against demons and undead, they require compatible wielders attuned to holy power. Warriors armed with holy weapons threaten beings far beyond nominal power levels.
70.name: Holy Weapon

71.content: Insectoids are intelligent monster species with insect-like physiology, ranging from ant colonies to individual larger creatures. Insectoid colonies often operate as unified hive societies with specialized castes fulfilling different roles within the group. Individual insectoids can develop intelligence and autonomy, particularly if they acquire sufficient magical power through evolution. Insectoids possess exoskeletons providing natural armor and are typically swift in combat. Some insectoid species display telepathic or chemical communication capabilities linking colony members. Insectoid evolution can produce humanoid forms with retained insectoid characteristics such as multiple limbs or chitinous armor. Insectoid populations can expand rapidly, allowing small groups to become substantial forces quickly.
71.name: Insectoid

72.content: Kurobe is a Kijin blacksmith known as Legend Forge-Talker for legendary-quality work. Soft-spoken and kind despite fierce appearance, he survived the Orc War and befriended dwarf Kaijin. When named by Rimuru, he transformed and became happy, devoting himself to forge the finest weapons.
72.name: Kurobe

73.content: Luminous Valentine is a Demon Lord and fifth seat of the Octagram, true ruler of Lubelius. Created by Divine Ancestor Twilight Valentine, she killed her creator and ruled Lubelius hidden for 1,500 years through puppet Holy Emperor Louis. Haughty and refined, she values friendships with Chloe and Hinata, sealing Chloe's body to prevent Chronoa chaos.
73.name: Luminous Valentine

74.content: The Minotaur Labyrinth is a complex dungeon inhabited by minotaur species. The labyrinth features intricate passages and chambers that form a natural maze, making it a distinctive location within the world of Jura.
74.name: Minotaur Labyrinth

75.content: The Moderate Alliance is a coalition of nations and factions that seek to maintain balance in the world's geopolitical landscape without aligning exclusively with the Octagram or other extreme powers. The Alliance represents mid-tier powers with significant territorial and military interests. The Moderate Alliance operates as a counterbalance to more aggressive expansionist policies pursued by larger powers. The Alliance includes various human and demi-human nations seeking mutual protection and economic cooperation. The Alliance maintains diplomatic ties with multiple factions to preserve its independence.
75.name: Moderate Alliance

76.content: The Phantom King Academy Incident involves Chloe, a student with a time paradox nature caught between preventing and ensuring a future catastrophe. The incident demonstrates temporal mechanics as dangerous threats beyond military force. Resolution involved accepting the paradox rather than eliminating it.
76.name: Phantom King Academy Incident

77.content: The Resistance War encompasses conflicts where oppressed populations resisted tyrannical rule through strategic organization and guerrilla tactics. Including resistance to Farmus policies, orc invasions, and demon lord domination, these movements demonstrated that coordinated populations threaten militarily superior forces. Major powers learned that conquest requires constant suppression when populations remain hostile.
77.name: Resistance War

78.content: Shura is an ancient demon nation and region located in a separate dimension accessible through the Demon Realm. Shura is known as a hotbed of conflict and struggle, where the most powerful demons gather and compete for dominance. The region operates under different rules and governance compared to the surface world, with its own hierarchy of demon lords and influential entities. Shura maintains diplomatic contact with other major powers through representatives who attend Walpurgis meetings. The Shura region continues to be an independent power center in the geopolitical landscape of the world.
78.name: Shura

79.content: The Spiritual Domain is a realm separate from the physical world, inhabited by spirits and spiritual entities. The domain serves as one of the parallel worlds in the cosmology alongside other spiritual locations like the Demon Realm and Underworld.
79.name: Spiritual Domain

80.content: Swordsmanship is a martial discipline developed through practice, combining physical prowess with precise weapon handling. Enhanced through magic imbuing, skilled users create fusion techniques like Holy Sword Arts. This discipline teaches energy flow, timing, and positioning, complementing skill-based combat for enhanced effectiveness.
80.name: Swordsmanship

81.content: Testarossa, Blanc the Primordial of White, is the second-oldest Primordial who joined Tempest after Diablo recruited her. Elegant yet harboring daemon cruelty, she serves as Military Attaché and Ambassador. Her ancient pact with Silberia ended in grief when the princess preferred friendship, leading to her rampage and the Lake Shore Dyed Scarlet Incident.
81.name: Testarossa

82.content: Treants are intelligent humanoid creatures with bodies composed of or derived from living wood and plant matter. Treants possess natural affinity for healing magic, regeneration, and communion with natural environments. Treants are typically slow-moving but exceptionally durable, with bodies capable of withstanding significant damage due to their ligneous composition. Treants can perceive vibrations through soil and root systems, granting awareness of distant events and entities. Treants are naturally long-lived, with some individuals reaching ages of centuries. Treants typically maintain isolated existences in forests or sacred groves, rarely engaging in wider civilization. Treant evolution can produce more powerful variants with advanced magical capabilities and greater mobility.
82.name: Treant

83.content: Ultima, Violet the Primordial, is the second-youngest Primordial appearing as a cute girl with purple hair and shapeshifting wings. Beneath her carefree demeanor lies cruel scheming who enjoys torturing souls. She serves as Chief Prosecutor in Tempest and leader of the Black Numbers, counted among the Twelve Guardian Lords.
83.name: Ultima

84.content: Velgrynd is the third-oldest True Dragon embodying acceleration and controlling fire. Possessing Ultimate Skill Raguel, she fell in love with Chosen hero Rudra and devoted herself to him. After Rimuru defeated her and freed her from Michael's influence, Ciel granted her power to search for Rudra's soul across worlds.
84.name: Velgrynd
